title: holarrhena mitis
intro: Holarrhena mitis, also known as Kola nut or Wood apple, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic effects. The health benefits of Holarrhena mitis include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, or tinctures, which are commonly consumed in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine practices.
